query:
SELECT 
  sl.id,
  sl.name,
  sl.category,
  sl.address,
  sl.phone,
  sl.website,
  sl.email,
  sl.rating,
  sl.review_count,
  sl.qualification_score,
  sl.score_tier,
  sl.latitude,
  sl.longitude,
  sl.place_id,
  sl.source,
  sl.notes,
  sl.created_at,
  sl.updated_at,
  u.name as saved_by
FROM saved_leads sl
LEFT JOIN users u ON sl.user_id = u.id
ORDER BY sl.score_tier ASC, sl.qualification_score DESC, sl.category ASC, sl.name ASC;
